title: Phoenix Crates Lite

<details>
<summary>Image transcription</summary>
  
# What is Phoenix Crates?

Phoenix Crates is one of the most exclusive and unique crate plugin you can find on the market. With a super customized animation system that allows to build your own animations, we also support customized models and customized items. This is a lite version, for more info please check our [plans page](https://www.myphoenixstore.com/plans/phoenix-crates)

# Migrate from your crate plugins
You can now migrate from your crate plugins such as Excellent Crates, Crazy Crates and Custom Crates

# Our features:

**Crates**
- Up to 5 crates
- Wide version compability
- Supports textured/modded rewards
- Fully customizable in-game from a GUI system.
- Knockback when don't have the right key.
- Easily editable yml files.
- Plugin Messages/Texts 100% configurable.
- Multiple locations per crate.
- Preview rewards system of each crate.
- Customizable rewards preview menus
- Crate configuration file per file
- Crate block can be any material including custom skulls.
- Ability to make crate require permission to be able to open it.
- Money requirement to open a crate. (Vault required).
- Option to use or not a key to open a crate.
- Virtual keys
- Milestones
- Multiple win rewards
- Multiple reward items
- Open cooldown per crate.
- Custom open permission per crate.
- Custom Hologram per Crate
- Support PlaceholderAPI for commands
- It has no dependency. Install the plugin and it's ready to use.

**Rewards**
- Supports any custom item.
- Rewards can have executable commands by console/player.
- Customizable reward display name.
- Option to broadcast reward win for all online players.
- Maximum amount or unlimited wins per reward.
- Total rewards percentage does not have to be 100%, the system adjusts it automatically.
- Blacklist permissions
- Alternative Reward when certain conditions are met.

**Animations**
- Possibility to create your own animation.
- Variety of possible combinations for the idle/opening animation.
- Completely smooth and well-timed animations.
- Animations contain sounds.
- Animation can appear for all players or just one.
- Animations without any lag, everything is packet-based.

For more info please check our [Plans comparison page] (https://www.myphoenixstore.com/plans/phoenix-crates#comparison)

If you need assistance with our plugin make sure to [join our discord(https://myphoenixstore.com/media/discord)
</details>
